zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Neville於1392年出生在英國達勒姆拉比時，他的父親Ralph Neville29歲，母親Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland28歲。他和Mary Ferrers至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1458年2月25日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾奧維斯利 格林享年66歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆斯泰德洛普。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

English: variant of   Noel  .

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Neville was born in 1392, in Raby, Durham, England, his father, Ralph Neville, was 29 and his mother, Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland, was 28. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Mary Ferrers. He died on 25 February 1458, in Oversley Green, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Staindrop, Durham, England.

Il est décédé le 25 février 1458, à Oversley Green, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Staindrop, Durham, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Nevilleが1392年にイギリスダルハムラビーで生まれた時，父Ralph Nevilleは29歳，母Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmorelandは28歳であった。彼はMary Ferrersとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1458年2月25日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアオバースリー グレンで66歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムスティインドロップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Neville(이)가 1392년 영국 뒤람 라비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Neville(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Mary Ferrers(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1458년 2월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 버슬리 그린에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 스테인드럽에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Mary Ferrers. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Neville родился в 1392 г. в местности раби, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Neville было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland, 28. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Mary Ferrers. Он умер 25 февраля 1458 г. в местности овирсли грин, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности стеиндроп, дурам, Англия.
